title: Wabtec's (WAB) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Supply-chain disruptions hurt Wabtec's (WAB) Q4 sales to the tune of 3-4%.

title: Wabtec Reports Strong 4th Quarter 2021 Results
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) today reported fourth quarter 2021 GAAP earnings per diluted share of $1.02, up 121.7% versus the fourth quarter of 2020. Adjusted earnings per diluted share were $1.18, up 20.4% versus the same quarter a year ago. Fourth quarter sales were $2.07 billion and cash from operations was $314 million. Full year 2021 earnings per diluted share was $2.96, up 36.4% versus full year 2020. Full year adjusted earnings per diluted share were $4.26

title: What's in the Cards for Wabtec (WAB) This Earnings Season?
text: Rising capital expenditures might have hurt Wabtec's (WAB) fourth-quarter 2021 performance.
